summary: Iter 241 — Verified Task B (Dashboard quick-action label 'تقرير المشتريات الخارجية'), Task C (purchases-report invoice_image_url under /api/uploads/invoices/ resolves HTTP 200 PNG for purchase #104), Task D (price-increases report renders test material with 3 rows incl. 1000→1300 +30% and KPIs; backend POST /api/purchases-new returns 400 PRICE_INCREASE_REASON_REQUIRED without reason and 200 with reason + price_increase_log stored), and Driver-freed-on-reject (assigning + PUT /api/orders/{id}/reject clears driver_id/name/phone).

critical.issue: Returns 500 ResponseValidationError because existing seed documents p1/p2/p3 are missing 'payment_method' and 'created_by' fields required by the response_model. Use /api/purchases-report instead — that one works. Either backfill seeds or relax model with defaults.

minor.issue: Returns empty list [] in this fork even though seed docs claim 'مورد تجريبي أ' and 'مورد تجريبي ب' exist (purchases-report row supplier_id='', supplier_name='غير محدد'). Re-seed may be needed if Supplier Dues banner regression matters.

issues: Left-side red 'طلب مرفوض من الكاشير' toasts from earlier rejected orders accumulate and partially overlap report filters/cards (zIndex), making some clicks miss. Auto-dismiss after N seconds or clamp max 3 visible.

action_items: [HIGH] Fix GET /api/purchases-new 500: backfill 'payment_method' & 'created_by' on seed purchases p1/p2/p3 or make the Pydantic response_model fields Optional with defaults.
[MED] Re-seed suppliers 'مورد تجريبي أ' / 'ب' so /api/suppliers is non-empty for SupplierDuesBanner & dropdown.
[LOW] Cap or auto-dismiss management-order-alerts toasts (they pile up across iterations and can obscure UI).
critical_code_review_comments: ExternalPurchasesReport.js: image URL normalization in imgUrl() works (verified /api/uploads/invoices/ src on purchase #104). Good.
PriceIncreaseReport.js: KPI cards + detailed table render correctly with 3 rows for 'مادة اختبار سعر'.
Backend create_purchase enforces +25% baseline correctly: 400 with detail.code=PRICE_INCREASE_REASON_REQUIRED; accepted with by_name reason; price_increase_log persisted on the purchase document.
reject_order and reject_customer_order both clear driver_id/driver_name/driver_phone — verified end-to-end (assign → reject → GET shows nulls).
Dashboard quick-action card with data-testid='quick-action-external-purchases-report' renders label 'تقرير المشتريات الخارجية' in centralized inventory mode.

Driver tracking badge (data-testid='driver-tracking-active-badge') was not automatically tested because Playwright headless requires explicit geolocation permission grant per browser context; recommend a small E2E with context.grant_permissions(['geolocation']) and a fake position for full coverage.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 new purchases of 'مادة اختبار سعر' during reason-enforcement test (TST-REASON-OK-*) which extends the price increase chain to 1000→1300→1700→2720. Existing demo orders (#5003 etc.) were used to verify reject; their driver_id/name/phone now cleared. No seed deletions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /api/purchases-report?start=YYYY-MM-DD&end=YYYY-MM-DD (NOT /api/purchases-new GET which 500s) to fetch purchases incl. invoice_image_url. Login: form has no data-testid for inputs — use locator('input[type=email]') with press_sequentially+delay; .fill() can race with the splash and yield unsubmitted form on first load. Post-login splash is ~12s. Toast pile-up of 'طلب مرفوض من الكاشير' obscures left side of all pages; click via .click(force=True) or scroll target into view. For driver-tracking-active-badge UI test, grant geolocation: context.grant_permissions(['geolocation']); context.set_geolocation({'latitude':33.31,'longitude':44.36}).
rca of the issue: /api/purchases-new GET 500 RCA: server.py / inventory_system.py response_model declares 'payment_method' and 'created_by' as required, but seed purchases p1/p2/p3 in MongoDB lack those fields (only inserted as test fixtures earlier). FastAPI raises ResponseValidationError. Fix options: (a) make those fields Optional[...] = None in the Pydantic model, (b) add migration to backfill, or (c) drop /api/purchases-new GET if /api/purchases-report supersedes it.
